scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
award_amount: Day scholar: ₹150/month + ₹750 ad hoc; Hosteller: ₹350/month + ₹1000 ad hoc
description_text: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC students in Classes 8 and 10 at government or government-aided schools. Family income must not exceed ₹2 lakh per annum. Awards cover monthly maintenance and ad hoc grants for books and stationery. Applications through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC and ST Students
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
award_amount: Maintenance allowance ₹530–₹1200/month depending on course level
description_text: Post-Matric Scholarship covers Class 11 onwards including UG PG and doctoral programmes for SC and ST students. Annual family income ceiling is ₹2.5 lakh. Covers tuition fees maintenance allowance and study tour charges. Apply through NSP portal.

scheme_name: PM YASASVI Scholarship for OBC and EWS
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description_text: PM YASASVI scholarship for OBC EWS and DNT students in Classes 9 and 11 at top residential schools. Family income must not exceed ₹2.5 lakh. Selection via YASASVI entrance test by NTA. Covers tuition and hostel charges.

scheme_name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship for Minority Girls
administering_body: Maulana Azad Education Foundation
description_text: Scholarship exclusively for meritorious girls from Muslim Christian Sikh Buddhist Jain or Zoroastrian minority communities. Family income not exceeding ₹2 lakh. Students must score at least 50% in previous exam. Apply through NSP portal.

scheme_name: Pre and Post Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
eligible_education_levels: Class 8, Class 10, Class 12, Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PhD
description_text: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities of at least 40% pursuing education from Class 1 onwards including professional courses. Family income not exceeding ₹2.5 lakh. Covers maintenance allowance book grant and reader allowance for visually impaired. Apply on NSP.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scholarship for College and University Students
administering_body: Department of Higher Education
description_text: Central Sector Scholarship for meritorious students from families with income below ₹4.5 lakh. Students must be in top 20 percentile in Class 12 board. Tenable for regular degree courses at accredited colleges. Not applicable for private engineering and medical colleges.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minority Communities
administering_body: Ministry of Minority Affairs
description_text: Scholarship for Muslim Christian Sikh Buddhist Jain and Zoroastrian minority students in Classes 1 to 10. Family income not exceeding ₹1 lakh. At least 50% scholarships reserved for girls. Students must score at least 50% in previous class.

scheme_name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Minority Communities
administering_body: Ministry of Minority Affairs
description_text: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Muslim Christian Sikh Buddhist Jain and Zoroastrian minority students in technical and professional UG and PG courses. Family income not exceeding ₹2.5 lakh. 30% reserved for girls.

scheme_name: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Merit Scholarship
administering_body: Social Justice Dept, Government of Maharashtra
description_text: Merit scholarship for OBC NT and SBC students domiciled in Maharashtra. Family income not exceeding ₹8 lakh. Students must score at least 60% in qualifying exam. Available for UG and PG degree courses at Maharashtra government and government-aided colleges.

scheme_name: SC/ST Pre-Matric Scholarship Karnataka
administering_body: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Karnataka
description_text: Karnataka Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC and ST students in Classes 1 to 10 at government or government-aided schools. Family income not exceeding ₹1.5 lakh. Higher maintenance for hostellers. Apply on Karnataka Scholarship Portal. Students must be domiciled in Karnataka.

scheme_name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students
administering_body: All India Council for Technical Education
description_text: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for girl students pursuing first-year UG degree or diploma in AICTE-approved technical institutions. Family income not exceeding ₹8 lakh. Only one girl child per family eligible per year. Covers tuition fees up to ₹50000 per annum plus incidentals.

scheme_name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Specially-Abled Students
administering_body: All India Council for Technical Education
description_text: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities of at least 40% in AICTE-approved technical UG degree or diploma programmes. Family income not exceeding ₹8 lakh. Covers tuition fees up to ₹50000 per year plus ₹2000 per month incidental charges.

scheme_name: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education in Sciences
administering_body: Department of Science and Technology
description_text: INSPIRE SHE scholarship for students pursuing Basic and Natural Sciences at UG and PG level. No income limit - purely merit based. Students must be in top 1% in Class 12 board or qualify JEE/NEET. ₹80000 per year for 5 years covering BSc and MSc.

scheme_name: UGC Fellowship for SC/ST Girls for PhD Research
administering_body: University Grants Commission
description_text: UGC Fellowship for SC/ST girl students pursuing PhD in any recognised university. Must have qualified NET/GATE or been admitted through a national entrance test. Stipend ₹25000 for first 2 years rising to ₹28000 plus annual contingency grants for research.

scheme_name: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme for EWS Students
administering_body: Ministry of Education
description_text: PM Scholarship for Economically Weaker Section General category students with income below ₹8 lakh. Must score at least 60% in Class 12. Covers UG and PG at recognised universities. Girl students receive higher award. Processed through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students Uttar Pradesh
administering_body: Social Welfare Dept, Government of Uttar Pradesh
award_amount: Full tuition fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance ₹230–₹550/month
description_text: Uttar Pradesh state Post-Matric Scholarship for SC students in Class 11 and above including professional courses. Income ceiling ₹2.5 lakh. Provides full tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance allowance. Students must be domiciled in UP.

scheme_name: BC/MBC Post-Matric Scholarship Tamil Nadu
administering_body: Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Dept, Tamil Nadu
description_text: Tamil Nadu state scholarship for BC MBC and DNC students pursuing Class 11 and above. Family income not exceeding ₹2 lakh. Covers full tuition fee and monthly maintenance allowance. Students must be domiciled in Tamil Nadu and studying in government or aided institutions.

scheme_name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship for North East India
administering_body: University Grants Commission
description_text: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship for students from North East India pursuing UG studies outside the region. Family income not exceeding ₹4.5 lakh. Covers Arunachal Pradesh Assam Manipur Meghalaya Mizoram Nagaland Sikkim and Tripura students.

scheme_name: Dr Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship for EBC Students Rajasthan
administering_body: Social Justice Dept, Government of Rajasthan
description_text: Rajasthan state Post-Matric Scholarship for EBC students in Class 11 and above. Family income not exceeding ₹1 lakh. Covers tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance. Students must be domiciled in Rajasthan and studying in Rajasthan institutions.

scheme_name: Scholarship for Girls for Secondary Education
administering_body: Ministry of Education
description_text: Scholarship for girls who pass Class 8 from Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas or government schools in EBB districts to continue secondary education in Classes 9-12. No income limit. ₹3000 deposited as fixed deposit redeemable after Class 12 completion.
